title: Levice、Nitra Region — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Levice、Nitra Regionの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

LeviceはNitra Regionにある人口32,000の都市です。A historic town in southern Slovakia, known for its medieval castle, thermal baths, and a strategic location in the fertile Danube lowlands.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
